label: UKMTO: Critical
description: Strait of Hormuz closed by Iran on 18 Apr 2026 after US refused to lift naval blockade of Iranian ports. UKMTO reports Iranian gunboats fired on two commercial vessels; IRGC has conducted 21 confirmed attacks on merchant shipping and laid naval mines. Commercial transits collapsed to single digits per day (8 on 9 Apr, 2 on 10 Apr, 4 on 11 Apr). JMIC regional risk level CRITICAL (Update 034, 19 Apr). Southern Red Sea elevated — Houthis sank two unescorted vessels last week, doubling ships sunk since 2023.
